functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Crab Tide Book
pages:
Crab Tide Book

A sandy shore guide for crab watchers, shell crafters, and treasure hunters of Choascraft.

Fact 1

Crabs are crustaceans. Their bodies are protected by a hard outside shell called an exoskeleton.

Fact 2

Most crabs have ten legs. The front pair are claws used for defense, feeding, and grabbing objects.

Fact 3

Crabs grow by molting. They shed the old shell and hide while the new shell hardens.

Fact 4

Many crabs walk sideways because of how their leg joints bend, though some can move forward and backward too.

Fact 5

Crabs breathe with gills. Even land crabs need moisture so their gills can keep working.

Fact 6

Many crabs are scavengers and omnivores. They clean up beaches by eating bits of plants, animals, and leftovers.

Fact 7

Crab eyes often sit on stalks. This gives them a wide view while much of the body stays low or hidden.

Fact 8

Some crabs can regrow lost legs or claws across later molts.

Fact 9

Female crabs often carry eggs tucked under the abdomen until the young are ready to hatch.

Fact 10

Burrows help crabs avoid heat, predators, and dry air. A good patch of sand is worth guarding.

Choascraft Crabs

Crabs spawn around sand and red sand beaches in small groups. About 1 in 3 natural crabs spawn as babies. They can walk, swim, return to land, and attack for 3 damage.

Crab Drops

Crabs can drop Crab Legs, Crab Claw, Crab Shell, Crab Eyes, and the rare Crab Orb.

Crab Buckets

Use a bucket on a crab to scoop it up into a Crab Bucket. Place it later when you want to move a crab safely.

Crab Breeding

Adult crabs breed with tropical fish buckets. Babies grow over time and can follow nearby adult crabs. Feed baby crabs rotten flesh or tropical fish buckets to help them grow faster.

Treasure Digging

Ready adult crabs are tempted by rotten flesh. Use rotten flesh on one to make it search sand or red sand for treasure. After feeding, the crab has a 30 second cooldown.

Treasure Notes

The treasure pool has 50 normal Minecraft items. An enchanted golden apple can also appear as a 1 in 100 bonus.

Crab Cooking

Cook Crab Legs in a furnace, smoker, campfire, or soul campfire to make Steamed Crab Legs.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
S = Crab Shell
O = Crab Orb
C = Crab Claw
L = Crab Legs
E = Crab Eyes
. = empty slot

Crab Sword

.C.
SIO
.L.

ISI
ISI

Netherite Crab Gear

Use a smithing table with a netherite upgrade template, crab gear, and a netherite ingot.

Tide Note

Hand-feed rotten flesh instead of dropping it. If the crab is on cooldown, it will not be tempted by rotten flesh until the cooldown finishes.

Treasure Loot Odds

Each dig rolls 1 normal treasure item. Total normal pool weight: 249. Percent chances are approximate.

Bonus rolls can add extra loot.
